stories.title: Valero Texas Open Round 1 — Fleetwood, Spieth, and 22 Masters Hopefuls Tee It Up

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
It's MASTERS WEEK EVE season.

The Valero Texas Open tees off TODAY. The winner gets the last automatic Masters invite.

Fleetwood. Åberg. Spieth (2021 champion). Bubble players clinging to OWGR spots.

One tournament. One week left. Let's go.

#GolfFanrecap #Valero #PGATour

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Jordan Spieth won the Valero Texas Open in 2021.

He's +1600 this week. The course fits his game better than almost anyone in the field.

And he needs the form heading into Augusta. This is a must-watch round.

#GolfFanrecap #Valero #Spieth

article.headline: Round 1 at Valero Texas Open: Masters Spots on the Line as Fleetwood, Spieth, and Bubble Players Tee Off

stories.title: Brooks Koepka Returns to PGA Tour — Just in Time for Masters

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
BREAKING: Brooks Koepka has left LIV Golf and rejoined the PGA Tour.

The release was "amicable and mutually agreed."

He's a 4-time major champion. He's a past Masters champion.

He only needs the Masters to complete the career Grand Slam.

#GolfFanrecap #Masters #Koepka

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Koepka rejoining the PGA Tour adds a massive storyline to Augusta.

2x PGA Champion. 2x U.S. Open Champion. Needs only the Masters.

He's been to Augusta before. He knows how to win majors. The Grand Slam chase just got a fourth serious name.

#GolfFanrecap #Masters #GrandSlam

article.headline: Koepka Returns to PGA Tour — Four-Time Major Champion Back Just in Time for Masters

stories.title: Masters 7 Days Away — New 17th Hole, 22 Debutants, $21M Purse

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
7 days until the Masters.

New in 2026: the 17th hole shortened 12 yards. $21 million purse. 22 first-timers in the field.

And Rory McIlroy is hosting the Champions Dinner on Tuesday.

The 90th Masters is about to be something special.

#GolfFanrecap #Masters #Augusta

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Masters 2026 odds right now:

Scheffler +550
DeChambeau/Rahm +1000
McIlroy +1100
Schauffele +1500
Åberg +1600

Tiger is listed at +20000.

Seven days. One green jacket. Every shot matters.

#GolfFanrecap #Masters #Augusta

article.headline: Masters 2026: 7 Days to Augusta — New 17th Hole, $21M Purse, and 22 Debutants

stories.title: Morikawa's Augusta Secret — Best Record Among Grand Slam Chasers at Augusta

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Among Grand Slam chasers, Morikawa has the BEST Augusta record.

Most top-5s. Most top-10s. Most top-25s. Top-15 every year for 4 straight Masters.

He needs only the green jacket. Don't overlook him.

#GolfFanrecap #Masters #Morikawa

article.headline: The Data Case for Morikawa: He Has the Best Augusta Record Among All Grand Slam Chasers

stories.title: Fitzpatrick the Dark Horse — Back-to-Back Strong Form Heading Into Augusta

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Don't sleep on Matt Fitzpatrick at Augusta.

Back-to-back bogey-free rounds at Valspar. Runner-up at The Players.

He's a U.S. Open champion who hits irons better than almost anyone in the world.

Augusta was built for this kind of game.

#GolfFanrecap #Masters #Fitzpatrick

article.headline: Fitzpatrick the Dark Horse: Hot Form and Augusta-Perfect Ball-Striking Make Him Dangerous

stories.title: McIlroy's Back Injury Casts Shadow Over Masters Title Defense

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
McIlroy has a back injury. He's skipping events before Augusta.

Defending Masters champion. Completed the Grand Slam last year. Listed at +1100.

That back is the biggest question mark heading into Augusta.

#GolfFanrecap #Masters #McIlroy

stories.title: Chevron Championship Preview — Can Kim Make It Three in a Row?

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Hyo Joo Kim has back-to-back LPGA wins.

Two 61s in a single tournament (a first in LPGA history).

Now the Chevron Championship is next — the first women's major of 2026.

Can she make it three in a row?

#GolfFanrecap #LPGA #Chevron
